---
title: "Lesson 5: The Wand and the Hand"
date: "2026-05-22"
order: 6
description: "A high-school-level AI literacy primer, after Canon IX of the Bobble Canon. Three things you can name (wand, hand, weather), two big mistakes you can catch, and one practice you can keep. Companion to the [20-slide deck](/assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf)."
categories: [bobble, bobbology, ai literacy, canon, education]
path: /the-wand-and-the-hand.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/the-wand-and-the-hand.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/the-wand-and-the-hand.html");</script>
```
